title: Thousands of Australians living in US face new restrictions on visa renewals - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Thousands of Australians living in US face new restrictions on visa renewals

## Thousands of Australians living in US face new restrictions on visa renewals
Jonathan Grode was featured on ABC News discussing the sudden impact of the Trump administration’s new directive on Australians in the U.S. on E-3 and other working visas. The policy change, which requires visa holders to return to Australia every two years for renewals rather than applying in nearby countries, has left many in “panic mode.” Grode is actively advising affected individuals and advocating for clearer guidance to reduce uncertainty for thousands of Australians living and working in the U.S.
